response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to performance optimization, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, AI/deep-learning workload expertise, and hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Background in performance optimization for various applications
concerns: Limited experience in AI accelerators and hardware optimization
No direct experience with SoC and IP modeling
Lack of specific experience in deep-learning workloads

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in AI accelerators
